svg.text: Agentic Splunk telemetry optimization · Shadow validation · MCP Server · Human-governed OTel export
X-Splunk-User / X-Splunk-Pass on every API call
Pipeline state · job progress · live refresh
Live charts · coverage tables · OTel YAML preview · MCP tool explorer · audit history
Single-scroll Mentor chat · sticky composer · no duplicate progress panels
FASTAPI BACKEND · Python · Port 8080 (serves UI + API)
SPLUNK ENTERPRISE · Official MCP Server + REST + HEC
splunk_mcp — MCP initialize OK → primary path
offline — local JSON replay when Splunk unreachable
READ ONLY — production-equivalent telemetry, never modified in place
① Bootstrap export (SPL → up to 25k events) ② Validation baseline replay
③ Live analytics charts ④ Index volume metrics for Command Center
Ingest via HEC or REST receiver during demo bootstrap
SHADOW INDEX — post-policy filtered telemetry for safe experimentation
① PolicyEngine output ingested here ② Validation candidate replay
③ Tagged validation_source per run for isolated SPL counts
HTTP 200/201/204 accepted · no double-ingest on stream receiver
1. MCP generate_spl tool → 2. GeminiService.generate_spl → 3. Template SPL matchers
Context injected: baseline counts, active proposal, validation results, index names
UI label always "SignalSmith Mentor" — deterministic agents remain auditable
Orchestrated by AnalysisOrchestrator · each agent writes audit records · human gates on policy + approval
Proves detection coverage with real SPL hit counts — not stubbed pass/fail
SPL + | stats count as count via MCP
PASS — candidate hits ≥ baseline hits per detection
FAIL — protected events lost → trigger Revision Agent
Single click POST /api/session/run orchestrates all phases with SSE progress
No auto-deploy — human approval required before OTel export
Full audit trail: every agent action logged to SQLite
Production source indexes never modified — shadow-only pattern
Rollback YAML generated alongside collector config
Encrypted token auth from Splunk MCP Server admin page
Count queries append | stats count as count for accurate replay
MCPRestBridge implements tool names via REST when MCP unavailable
Live analytics: service distribution, error rates, index volumes
8 deterministic pipeline agents — auditable, reproducible, testable
SignalSmith Mentor — natural language SPL + pipeline coaching
Session context: analysis ID, proposal, validation, index stats
43 automated tests including end-to-end validation loop
Revision Agent demonstrates true agentic ops — auto-fix on regression
Measurable GB/day ingest reduction with byte estimates per policy
Detection safety proofs before any production OTel rollout
Shadow pattern: optimize on candidate, prove on SPL, deploy at source
Works with Splunk Enterprise trial + Developer License
Hackathon: Observability · Security · Platform · Best MCP Server
SignalSmith: Cut Splunk ingest cost without cutting incident coverage
Read baseline → analyze with agents → apply to shadow candidate → replay detections via MCP → auto-revise if needed → human approve → export OTel YAML
Apache 2.0 · Splunk Agentic Ops Hackathon · SignalSmith v3.0
